utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the final format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if they are fully specified with all details: (1) health_coverage: includes plan name, monthly cost, scope (physical implied by medical treatments and emergency care; mental health explicitly not mentioned). The required format requests 'physical and mental health insurance with costs'. Mental health is not specified; thus not fully specified. (2) property_coverage: includes type (home contents), cost, coverage limit, and temporary accommodation; this satisfies 'home/contents insurance with costs'. (3) travel_coverage: includes type, cost, activities covered, equipment limit; satisfies 'travel insurance with costs'. (4) additional_services: lists services and costs; satisfies 'any enhancement services with costs'. (5) total_budget: provides monthly and annual totals with breakdown; satisfies 'complete monthly/annual cost breakdown'. Therefore, 4 of 5 items are fully specified.
